title: Widget small view layout
description: Create the systemSmall widget view in AggregatorWidget/WidgetViews.swift. The hero UIImage is set via .containerBackground(for: .widget). A dark gradient scrim (black to clear, bottom-up) ensures legibility. Title text (≤2 lines, .headline weight) and source name (.caption, .secondary color) sit above the scrim. widgetURL(_:) is set to the entry's deep-link URL so the whole widget is the tap target. Semantic colors and system fonts only; no hardcoded hex.
acceptance_criteria: Hero image set as .containerBackground using containerBackground(for: .widget)
Dark gradient scrim covers the bottom portion of the widget
widgetURL set to the entry's deep-link URL
No hardcoded hex colors; no non-system fonts
